themes.name: [Negative] Poor Trading Execution and High Risk of Financial Loss

quotes.text: For a financial trading application, execution speed and price accuracy are the most basic expectations.
Extremely poor and unacceptable trading experience with INDMoney.

themes.description: Users experience delayed order execution, huge differences in shown and executed prices, lagging charts, and unreliable platform performance, resulting in high risk of financial loss and poor trading experience.
themes.business_impact: Potential financial losses, damage to the company's reputation, and a high risk of user churn.
themes.root_cause_hypothesis: Inadequate system design, inefficient algorithmic execution, and lack of sufficient testing for extreme market scenarios.
themes.action_plan: • Review and optimize the trading execution engine, improve order matching algorithm, increase testing for edge cases, and provide more transparent information to users about their trades.

themes.name: [Negative] App Performance Issues

quotes.text: My basket is also clear and not preserved for one session.
Bugs This update totally waste. We are facing lots of problem, please fix this big bugs
horrible experience after the last update.
unable to install app after doing all options
very slow app with poor internet buffering

themes.description: Users are experiencing frequent app crashes/hangs, poor UI responsiveness, and issues with screen navigation. Some users report that the app is no longer showing important details such as STT charges, transaction history, and premium properly.
themes.business_impact: App crashes/hangs lead to significant loss of productivity, potential loss of revenue, and damage to brand reputation.
themes.root_cause_hypothesis: Poor quality control during the software development process, inadequate testing, or rushed deployment may have contributed to the issues.
themes.action_plan: • Conduct thorough testing and quality assurance, refactor the code to improve performance, and prioritize stability and usability fixes through continuous delivery.
teams_impacted: Android Eng, UX Design, Core Product, Testing
